india_trends.title: SBI Life-owned NBFC sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026, dividend
india_trends.summary: Paisalo Digital's board will meet on May 10, 2026, to approve Q4 FY26 financial results and consider a final dividend. The company is transitioning to an AI-powered lending platform, aiming to double AUM, revenue, and profitability within three years.

india_trends.title: Tesla stock rises over 1% as analysts predict exceptional Q1 earnings
india_trends.summary: Wall Street analysts forecast that the electric carmaker’s adjusted quarterly earnings will surge 30% in first quarter of 2026 as compared to the previous year

india_trends.title: RBI sharpens compliance norms, expands use cases of UPI-linked wallets for foreign visitors under draft PPI norms
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has unveiled draft guidelines for prepaid payment instruments. These new rules aim to strengthen compliance and customer protection. A key proposal includes UPI-linked wallets for foreign visitors. The framework also pushes for deeper integration of prepaid instruments with

india_trends.title: GE Vernova shares jump over 15% to record high after company raises 2026 outlook on data centre demand
india_trends.summary: GE Vernova's shares surged 15.2% to $1,142 after raising its full-year outlook and reporting strong Q1 results, with revenue up 16% YoY to $9.3 billion and a profit of $4.8 billion. The company anticipates 2026 revenue between $44.5 billion and $45.5 billion.

india_trends.title: Bank credit growth to ease to 12% in FY27 on West Asia war, evolving interest rate dynamics: Icra
india_trends.summary: Indian bank credit growth is set to slow down to under 12 percent this financial year. This moderation is driven by the ongoing West Asia conflict and changing interest rates. Small businesses and unsecured loans may see increased defaults. Banks will be cautious in lending to vulnerable sectors.

india_trends.title: India can grow above 7 pc even if crude oil costs USD 90-100/barrel: Assocham
india_trends.summary: India's economy shows resilience to high oil prices. Consumption drives growth, allowing over 7 percent annual expansion even with crude oil at USD 90-100 per barrel. Historical data supports this trend. Assocham predicts continued strong growth above 7 percent through 2026-27. This outlook contrast

india_trends.title: RBI approves Debasish Panda's name as next Bandhan Bank chairman
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has approved the appointment of Debasish Panda, a former IAS officer and ex-chairman of IRDAI, as the part-time chairman of Bandhan Bank for three years. Panda, who previously served as Secretary of the Department of Financial Services, will succeed Anup Kumar Sinha.

india_trends.title: 'Next 25 years will be about intelligent scale' in financial markets: SBI Chairman
india_trends.summary: The next 25 years in finance will prioritize intelligent scale, not just size. Artificial intelligence will be key for risk management and efficiency. Global integration and digital assets are also shaping the future. Meanwhile, the Reserve Bank of India has eased restrictions on offshore non-delive

india_trends.title: Caution at MPC as war muddies view
india_trends.summary: The minutes showed that while members expect inflation to rise further, it would be primarily driven by supply shocks, something that monetary policy has limited control over.

india_trends.title: Net sales growth of FDI companies moderated to 8.7% in FY25: RBI data
india_trends.summary: Net sales growth for select FDI companies in India moderated to 8.7% in 2024-25, down from 9.4% the previous year, according to RBI data. While services sector sales saw a slight increase, manufacturing sector growth decelerated. Operating profit growth also slowed to 10.7% due to rising expenses.

india_trends.title: Jio, Allianz form 50-50 joint venture to set up non-life insurance company
india_trends.summary: The partnership will harness Jio’s massive digital reach and Allianz’s global expertise to build a ‘new model’ for general and health insurance in India, the two companies said on Wednesday.

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday - The Economic Times
india_trends.summary: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday    The Economic Times

india_trends.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex declined, snapping a three-day rally due to IT and FMCG losses. Rising India VIX signaled caution, though broader trends remain positive with key support and resistance levels in focus.

india_trends.title: Impact on growth and inflation to depend on duration of West Asia conflict: RBI MPC
india_trends.summary: Reserve Bank of India policymakers are watching the West Asia conflict closely. A prolonged conflict could hurt India's economic growth and increase inflation. They have decided to wait for more clarity before making any policy changes. El Nino's impact on inflation is also a concern. India's econom

india_trends.title: Market Trading Guide: Buy Adani Green and HBL Engineering on Thursday for gains up to 16%
india_trends.summary: Nifty 50 ended lower, breaking its winning streak amid IT and FMCG weakness. Technical indicators show mixed signals with bearish bias short term. Analysts highlight support levels and recommend selective buying in Adani Green Energy and HBL Engineering.

india_trends.title: US extends Iran, Russian oil waivers by 30 days, offering relief to India and other vulnerable nations
india_trends.summary: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent extended sanctions relief on Russian and Iranian seaborne oil for 30 days following requests from 10 vulnerable nations. This decision reversed his earlier stance against renewal, with Bessent disputing claims that Iran gained over $14 billion from the relief.

india_trends.title: Only a handful of traders power India’s F&O volumes, highlights Zerodha's Nithin Kamath
india_trends.summary: Nithin Kamath said India’s F&O market remains small despite perceptions, with limited participation. A tiny group of 1–2% traders drives 60–70% of volumes, making brokerage revenues highly dependent on a narrow, concentrated investor base.

india_trends.title: India records 9.28 million new Telecom Subscribers in March; Broadband base hits 1.06 billion
india_trends.summary: India's telecommunications sector expanded by 9.28 million subscribers in March 2026, bringing the total number of telephone users in the country to 1,330.58 million. According to the latest data released by the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI), the industry maintained a monthly growth r

india_trends.title: Bandhan Bank gets RBI approval for new chairman
india_trends.summary: Bandhan Bank has secured prior approval from the Reserve Bank of India for Debasish Panda's appointment as its part-time chairman. Panda's tenure will span three years, commencing from the date he assumes charge. This strategic move follows Panda's extensive experience in the financial sector, inclu

world_trends.title: I’m exactly 5 years from retirement. Here’s what I’ll do first to prepare.
world_trends.summary: I just turned 54½, and this could be my most consequential age milestone, because it’s the ideal time for me to start detailed planning for my golden years.

world_trends.title: Honeywell’s Quantinuum is making a bold statement with its upcoming IPO
world_trends.summary: Quantinuum is going the traditional IPO route, while other quantum companies have gone public through SPACs. The move bolsters the company’s credibility.
